description: CompositionBlue printed kaftan top made of 100% viscose, has raglan sleeves and a draw cord on the waist FittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyUse mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees)Do not wring or bleachFlat dry in shadeDo not iron on printEthnic fused with oodles of attitude results in this stylish top from jealous 21.
